synopsis: Who can be saved? What must be sacrificed? Kerra Holt will decide once and for all what it means to be a Jedi in the concluding issue of Aflame! Sith Lord Odion and his army arrive at Chelloa prepared to take over the mining planet, but upon arriving, Odion finds a terrible surprise from his brother, Lord Daiman. World--devastating war is inescapable, but Kerra knows that when all hope is lost, that is when the Jedi are needed the most! * John Jackson Miller's Knight Errant novel for Del Rey starring Kerra Holt hits shelves January 25! * Read about Kerra Holt here first in Dark Horse comics! Putting the War back in Star Wars!
title: Knight Errant: Aflame #5
